channel.title: CyberNetSec - Threat Actor
channel.description: Latest threat actor threat intelligence - the last 10 articles

item.title: Actively Exploited 'ShiftScribe' Zero-Day in Apex-Office Suite Puts Millions at Risk
item.description:
A critical remote code execution (RCE) zero-day vulnerability, named 'ShiftScribe' and tracked as CVE-2026-35801, has been discovered in the popular Apex-Office Suite, affecting over 100 million users. The flaw, with a CVSS score of 9.6, is being actively exploited by the state-sponsored threat acto...

Severity: Critical

Categories: Vulnerability, Threat Actor, Cyberattack

Read Full Article →

item.title: 'SandViper' APT Hits Global Energy Sector with New 'DuneStalker' Espionage Malware
item.description:
A new report from Dragos Inc. details a sophisticated cyber-espionage campaign targeting the global energy sector by a previously unknown threat actor named 'SandViper'. The campaign, active since late 2025, focuses on oil and gas companies in the Middle East and Europe. SandViper uses a novel modul...

Severity: High

Categories: Threat Actor, Malware, Industrial Control Systems

Read Full Article →

item.title: 'Synapse' Wiper Malware Disguised as Ransomware, Designed for Maximum Destruction
item.description:
Kaspersky researchers have published a detailed analysis of 'Synapse,' a new and highly destructive malware strain. Initially mistaken for ransomware, Synapse is a pure wiper designed to cause irreversible data loss. It uses deception by dropping a fake ransom note and encrypting a few non-essential...

Severity: Critical

Categories: Malware, Threat Actor, Threat Intelligence

Read Full Article →

item.title: New Email Attacks Use Real Microsoft Login Pages to Bypass MFA
item.description:
Security researchers are warning about increasingly sophisticated email attacks, including the Tycoon 2FA Phishing-as-a-Service (PhaaS) platform. This adversary-in-the-middle (AiTM) attack uses a reverse proxy to present the victim with a real Microsoft login page. When the user authenticates and co...

Severity: High

Categories: Phishing, Malware, Threat Actor

Read Full Article →

item.title: Russian APT Gamaredon Enhances Malware and Evasion Techniques in Ukraine War
item.description:
The Russian APT group Gamaredon has continued to evolve its malware arsenal and evasion tactics in its relentless cyber campaign against Ukraine. Recent analysis shows the group is increasingly using legitimate cloud services like Cloudflare for C2, collaborating with other Russian APTs like Turla, ...

Severity: High

Categories: Threat Actor, Cyberattack, Malware

Read Full Article →

item.title: Tata Electronics Confirms Cyberattack; Hackers Claim Leak of Apple and Tesla Data
item.description:
Indian manufacturing giant Tata Electronics, a key supplier for Apple, has confirmed it sustained a cyberattack. The admission follows claims by a hacking group called 'World Leaks' that it stole and published over 630GB of sensitive data. The leaked files allegedly include intellectual property, te...

Severity: High

Categories: Data Breach, Supply Chain Attack, Threat Actor

Read Full Article →

item.title: New 'Icarus' Extortion Group Hits Klue, Steals Customer Salesforce Data via OAuth Attack
item.description:
The competitive intelligence platform Klue has confirmed a security breach where attackers gained unauthorized access to its customers' connected Salesforce environments. A new extortion group named 'Icarus' has claimed responsibility. The attack vector involved the theft and abuse of OAuth tokens, ...

Severity: High

Categories: Data Breach, Threat Actor, Cloud Security

Read Full Article →

item.title: Teen Hackers Convicted in Transport for London (TfL) Cyber-Attack
item.description:
A group of teenagers has been convicted for carrying out a cyber-attack against Transport for London (TfL). The incident has raised serious concerns about the security of public transport systems and the effectiveness of intervention programs, as the individuals were already known to law enforcement...

Severity: High

Categories: Cyberattack, Industrial Control Systems, Threat Actor

Read Full Article →

item.title: German Defense Firm Atlas Elektronik Breached by 'TheGentlemen' Group
item.description:
Atlas Elektronik GmbH, a leading German provider of defense and maritime technology, has been listed as a victim by the threat actor group 'TheGentlemen.' The breach, reported on June 26, 2026, represents a significant cyberattack on a critical defense contractor, raising concerns about the potentia...

Severity: Critical

Categories: Data Breach, Threat Actor, Industrial Control Systems

Read Full Article →

item.title: INC_RANSOM Hits Indian Agro-Tech Firm GSP Crop Science in Ransomware Attack
item.description:
GSP Crop Science Limited, an agricultural technology company based in India, has fallen victim to a ransomware attack by the 'INC_RANSOM' group. The breach, reported on June 26, 2026, threatens a key player in India's agricultural sector. INC_RANSOM is known for its double-extortion tactics, where i...

Severity: High

Categories: Ransomware, Data Breach, Threat Actor

Read Full Article →
